_meta.title: NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5 — SC Family (System and Communications Protection)
_meta.description: Selected controls from the SC family most relevant to data protection

controls.title: Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Develop, document, and disseminate system and communications protection policy and procedures.

controls.title: Information in Shared System Resources
controls.description: Prevent unauthorized and unintended information transfer via shared system resources.

controls.title: Boundary Protection
controls.description: Monitor and control communications at the external and key internal boundaries of the system.

controls.title: Boundary Protection | Prevent Exfiltration
controls.description: Prevent the unauthorized exfiltration of information, implementing DLP and outbound content inspection.

controls.title: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
controls.description: Protect the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information using cryptographic mechanisms.

controls.title: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity | Cryptographic Protection
controls.description: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure and detect changes during transmission.

controls.title: Cryptographic Key Establishment and Management
controls.description: Establish and manage cryptographic keys using approved key management technology and processes.

controls.title: Cryptographic Key Establishment and Management | Availability
controls.description: Maintain availability of information in the event of the loss of cryptographic keys by users.

controls.title: Cryptographic Key Establishment and Management | Symmetric Keys
controls.description: Produce, control, and distribute symmetric cryptographic keys using approved key management technology and processes.

controls.title: Cryptographic Protection
controls.description: Determine the required uses and types of cryptography employed within the system, implementing FIPS-validated cryptography.

controls.title: Transmission of Security and Privacy Attributes
controls.description: Associate security and privacy attributes with information exchanged between systems and between system components.

controls.title: Public Key Infrastructure Certificates
controls.description: Issue public key certificates under an appropriate certificate policy or obtain public key certificates from an approved service provider.

controls.title: Session Authenticity
controls.description: Protect the authenticity of communications sessions using mechanisms that prevent hijacking.

controls.title: Protection of Information at Rest
controls.description: Protect the confidentiality and integrity of information at rest using cryptographic mechanisms.

controls.title: Protection of Information at Rest | Cryptographic Protection
controls.description: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure and modification of information at rest.

controls.title: Process Isolation
controls.description: Maintain a separate execution domain for each executing system process, supporting confidential computing use cases.

controls.title: System Time Synchronization
controls.description: Synchronize system clocks within and between systems, supporting audit log correlation for data access monitoring.

controls.title: Media Access
controls.description: Restrict access to digital and non-digital media to authorized individuals.

controls.title: Media Marking
controls.description: Mark system media indicating the distribution limitations, handling caveats, and applicable security markings.

controls.title: Media Storage
controls.description: Physically control and securely store digital and non-digital media within controlled areas.

controls.title: Media Transport
controls.description: Protect and control digital and non-digital media during transport outside of controlled areas.

controls.title: Media Sanitization
controls.description: Sanitize system media prior to disposal, release, or reuse using approved sanitization techniques and procedures.

controls.title: Media Sanitization | Review, Approve, Track, Document, Verify
controls.description: Review, approve, track, document, and verify media sanitization and disposal actions.

controls.title: Media Use
controls.description: Restrict and prohibit the use of certain types of system media on systems and system components.
